name: io.github.KimJiSeong1994/jiphyeonjeon-agent
title: Jiphyeonjeon — Research Paper Agent
description: Agent-native research MCP: deep arXiv paper review, multi-source semantic search, citation graphs, curricula.

environmentVariables.name: JIPHYEONJEON_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: JWT bearer token for your 집현전 account (from POST /api/auth/login).

environmentVariables.name: JIPHYEONJEON_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: 집현전 API base URL. Defaults to https://jiphyeonjeon.kr; use http://localhost:8000 for self-hosting.
